examples: Through consumption, people come to understand, instill meaning in, and act upon objects encountered in the world.
The easy rhythm and pop arrangement even instill a feeling of musical eroticism.
Schools should foster children's interest in sports to instill into them the values of teamwork and sportsmanship.
How do you instill in your daughter a can-do spirit and these kinds of high standards?
This fact must instill some jealousy among their finned brethren, like the striped bass.
